name: refhub-codex
description: Operate RefHub through its public API and CLI from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Operate RefHub through the public API.
interface.longDescription: Search, read, import, export, audit, enrich, and update RefHub vault content from Codex using @refhub/cli and scoped RefHub API keys.
defaultPrompt: Search my RefHub vault for graph layout papers.
Import a BibTeX entry into my RefHub vault.
Enrich RefHub items with Semantic Scholar metadata.
